overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy video game (Elden Ring) showing an armored character exploring a misty underground ruin. The character navigates through overgrown outdoor passages, ascends ancient stone stairs, discovers and loots a glowing sarcophagus, then descends and climbs through vertical shafts.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown outdoor passage between stone walls

events.description: character rolls through tall grass and enters dark stone tunnel archway

agents.ego_description: rolling through dense vegetation toward a stone tunnel entrance

entered.detail: tall green grass and weeds covering the ground
tall weathered stone wall covered in moss
tall weathered stone wall with rough texture
dark stone archway leading into underground passage
decaying wooden logs lying in the grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow overgrown outdoor passage flanked by high stone walls. The character rolls through dense tall grass toward a dark tunnel archway, entering the underground ruin.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone stairwell carved through bedrock

events.description: exits outdoor area and enters enclosed stone tunnel system
character transitions from rolling to running up steep stone stairs

agents.ego_description: running up a narrow stone staircase winding through rough bedrock walls

entered.detail: ancient worn stone steps ascending through the tunnel
natural rock walls with rough uneven surfaces
arched stone ceiling supporting the tunnel structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed stairwell carved through bedrock. The environment shifts from organic outdoor growth to ancient stone architecture as the character ascends the winding stairs toward a distant chamber.

scene_state.functional_zone: small burial chamber with central stone coffin

events.description: emerges from stairwell into small stone chamber containing a sarcophagus
character opens the stone sarcophagus revealing glowing white loot items
character collects the glowing items from inside the coffin

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone sarcophagus, opening the lid, and retrieving glowing loot items

smooth cut stone walls of the burial chamber
smaller decorative coffin with black and white striped pattern
piles of rubble and broken stone fragments

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small burial chamber dominated by a large stone sarcophagus. After approaching the coffin, the character opens it to reveal glowing loot items, collects them, and prepares to exit the chamber.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending stairwell connecting to vertical shaft

events.description: exits the burial chamber and re-enters the descending stairwell
transitions from running down stairs to climbing a vertical stone shaft

agents.ego_description: leaving the chamber, descending stone stairs, then climbing a misty vertical passage

entered.detail: narrow vertical chimney with cut stone brick walls and misty atmosphere
smooth rectangular stone blocks forming the shaft walls
thick fog or mist filling the vertical shaft

segments.scene_description: The character exits the burial chamber and descends back through the stone stairwell. After reaching the bottom, the character transitions to climbing a narrow misty vertical shaft with cut stone walls, continuing the exploration deeper into the underground complex.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a lush, overgrown outdoor passage into the depths of a cold, ancient stone ruin. It begins with the character rolling through dense tall grass between high walls before passing through a dark tunnel archway. As the environment shifts from organic growth to carved bedrock, the camera follows the character ascending a narrow, winding stairwell toward a distant chamber. The scene then opens into a small burial room where the character opens a stone sarcophagus to reveal glowing loot, before turning back to descend the stairs. Finally, the camera tracks the character as they transition from the stairwell into a narrow, misty vertical shaft, climbing deeper into the underground complex.
